facts: NIT Rourkela (National Institute of Technology Rourkela) is located in District Sundargarh, Odisha, Pin 769008.
Climate: Winter, summer, and spring seasons.
All boys hostels at NIT Rourkela have 2-sharing rooms.
HB Hall has 2 and 3 sharing rooms.
KMS Hall has 2 and 3 sharing rooms.
CVR Hall has 2 and 3 sharing rooms.

common_items.lunch: Zeera Rice, Roti, Hard Dal, Sambhar, Pickle
common_items.dinner: Rice, Roti, Hard Dal, Sambhar, Pickle

monday.breakfast: Dng Idl (plain/full) + Aloo Tomato Bharta + Bread/Butter/Jam + Sprouted Mix/Orange + Milk/Tea
monday.lunch: Common items + Sago Mugu/Rajma + Salad + Curd

tuesday.breakfast: Masoor Idli + Sambar + Chutney + Dhapuri/Cornflakes + Sprout Mix/Orange + Milk/Tea
tuesday.lunch: Common items + Dahi Kadi + Ghanta Curry + Ppad + Salad + Curd + Lemon Rice

wednesday.breakfast: Chana/Bada + Dhokla/Poha/Uttam + Chutney/Bread + Sprout Mix + Milk/Tea
wednesday.lunch: Common items + Chilly Mushroom/Mugali + Paneer Curry/Bhujia + Aloo Kerala Poriyal + Salad + Curd + Tomato Rice

thursday.breakfast: Methi Puri/Patal + Cornflakes/Bada + Sprout Mix/Orange + Milk/Tea
thursday.lunch: Common items + Lauki Kofta Curry + Masoor Curry + Ambika ka Raita/Curd + Spl Darshila Rui
thursday.snacks: Per Bhaji/Sewara + D/Goan Roush Pack/Ruti + Coffee

friday.breakfast: Dng Idli/Upma + Bread/Butter + Sprout Mix/Orange + Milk/Tea
friday.lunch: Common items + Matar Paneer/Fish + Aloo Bhujia + Salad + Curd

saturday.lunch: Common items + Budi Rajgor Beryaji + Drumstick Badi + Tomato Kejar Khara + Aloo Cabbage Dry + Salad + Curd
saturday.snacks: Dahi Sewara (1)/Cream + Fried Rice Pack (1) + Coffee

sunday.lunch: Common items + Masala Dhi + Small Brj(1) + Paneer Butter Masala/Dry + Mah Chana Aloo + Khichdi/Brj + Curd + Dng Ice Cream (M/G)/Panna

mess.sprout_mix: One large spoon (Moong, chickpea, peas, onion, mustard, mixed masala)
mess.notes: Orange must be large and premium quality. Tea/coffee portions fixed for day, no substitutions. Staff must adhere to prescribed dress code. Food items must remain available throughout serving duration. Running out of any item is strictly prohibited. Any breach leads to penalties/compensation on caterer.
mess.cuisine: Mix of Odia (Ghanta Curry), North Indian (Paneer dishes, Biryani), and South Indian items. Both veg and non-veg options at dinner. Non-veg includes fish, chicken, and egg.

waivers.income_1L_to_5L: Tuition fee reduced to 1/3rd = Rs 20,833 per semester

fee_structure.notes: Other fees include Examination, Library, and Electricity charges. Mess advance is approximate.

facts: WiFi is available at NIT Rourkela with LAN cable connectivity and 5G.
75% attendance is mandatory at NIT Rourkela.
One bucket laundry charge is Rs 10.
Volleyball, Table Tennis, and Cricket are available.
Late registration fine: Rs 500 increment per day.
Every hall at NIT Rourkela has a gym.
Hospital at NIT Rourkela is open 24/7.
Odia and Hindi are spoken in and around NIT Rourkela.
Winter, summer, and spring seasons experienced at NIT Rourkela, Odisha.

academics.schedule_notes: Monday to Friday classes. Wednesday appears to be mostly free.
